// ==== KoineRuntime.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
// Koine PHP runtime: shared domain primitives, emitted once.
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Runtime;

use \InvalidArgumentException;
use \RuntimeException;

/**
 * Thrown when a domain invariant or illegal state transition is violated.
 */
class DomainInvariantViolationException extends RuntimeException
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly string $typeName,
        public readonly string $rule,
    ) {
        parent::__construct("Invariant violated on {$typeName}: {$rule}");
    }
}

/**
 * Thrown when an optimistic-concurrency version check fails on a versioned aggregate.
 */
class ConcurrencyConflictException extends RuntimeException
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly string $typeName,
        public readonly int $expected,
        public readonly int $actual,
    ) {
        parent::__construct(
            "Concurrency conflict on {$typeName}: expected version {$expected}, was {$actual}"
        );
    }
}

/**
 * A closed interval [start, end] over an orderable value, with containment and overlap.
 *
 * The comparator is optional: when absent the default PHP comparison operators (`<`, `<=`)
 * are used, which work for int, float, and string. Supply a callable(mixed,mixed):int
 * (negative / zero / positive) for custom ordering, e.g. on value objects.
 *
 * @template T
 */
class Range
{
    /** @param T $start
     * @param T $end
     * @param (callable(T,T):int)|null $comparator
     */
    public function __construct(
        public readonly mixed $start,
        public readonly mixed $end,
        private readonly mixed $comparator = null,
    ) {
        if ($this->cmp($start, $end) > 0) {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                'Range',
                'start must be less than or equal to end',
            );
        }
    }

    /** @param T $a @param T $b */
    private function cmp(mixed $a, mixed $b): int
    {
        if ($this->comparator !== null) {
            return ($this->comparator)($a, $b);
        }
        return $a <=> $b;
    }

    /** Returns true when $value lies within [start, end] inclusive.
     * @param T $value
     */
    public function contains(mixed $value): bool
    {
        return $this->cmp($value, $this->start) >= 0
            && $this->cmp($value, $this->end) <= 0;
    }

    /** Returns true when this range shares at least one point with $other.
     * @param Range<T> $other
     */
    public function overlaps(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->cmp($this->start, $other->end) <= 0
            && $this->cmp($other->start, $this->end) <= 0;
    }
}

/**
 * A value that folds with itself under add() — the seam the generic Decimal::sum() helper
 * binds to (@template T of Summable) so a value-object projection sums to its own type and
 * stays phpstan --level max clean (issue #692). The native parameter is the interface type so
 * an implementing value object never trips PHP's parameter-contravariance rule; the @param self
 * narrows it back for the implementer body, and @return static preserves the element type.
 */
interface Summable
{
    /**
     * @param self $other
     * @return static
     */
    public function add(self $other): self;
}

/**
 * A value with a total order via compareTo() — the seam the generic Decimal::min()/max()
 * helpers bind to (@template T of Comparable). Value objects are not orderable in the model
 * (KOI0212 rejects a value-object min/max selector), so Decimal is the only implementer today;
 * the bound keeps the Decimal-element min/max type-preserving and symmetric with Summable.
 */
interface Comparable
{
    /** @param self $other */
    public function compareTo(self $other): int;
}

/**
 * A string-backed arbitrary-precision decimal value (no float).
 *
 * Arithmetic delegates to PHP's BCMath extension (bcadd, bcsub, bcmul, bcdiv).
 * The scale (number of decimal places) defaults to 10; supply a higher value for
 * use-cases that demand finer precision.
 */
final class Decimal implements Summable, Comparable
{
    /** @var numeric-string The validated decimal string; numeric by construction. */
    private string $value;

    public function __construct(string|int $value, private readonly int $scale = 10)
    {
        $normalized = (string)$value;
        if (!is_numeric($normalized)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Invalid Decimal value: {$value}");
        }
        // is_numeric() above narrows $normalized to numeric-string, which the bc-math
        // helpers (bcadd/bcsub/bcmul/bcdiv/bccomp) require under phpstan --level max.
        $this->value = $normalized;
    }

    public function getValue(): string
    {
        return $this->value;
    }

    /** @param self $other */
    public function add(Summable $other): self
    {
        return new self(bcadd($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale), $this->scale);
    }

    public function sub(self $other): self
    {
        return new self(bcsub($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale), $this->scale);
    }

    public function mul(self $other): self
    {
        return new self(bcmul($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale), $this->scale);
    }

    public function div(self $other): self
    {
        if (bccomp($other->value, '0', $this->scale) === 0) {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException('Decimal', 'division by zero');
        }
        return new self(bcdiv($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale), $this->scale);
    }

    /** @param self $other */
    public function compareTo(Comparable $other): int
    {
        return bccomp($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale);
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->compareTo($other) === 0;
    }

    public function __toString(): string
    {
        return $this->value;
    }

    /**
     * Sums a non-empty array of decimals, folding under add() from the first element.
     *
     * A string-backed decimal has no implicit zero, so an EMPTY array raises a domain error
     * rather than fabricating one (parity with the C#/TypeScript/Python empty-fold guard).
     * A value-object projection whose add() returns its own type folds here too, and the
     * @template T of Summable bound keeps the result the element's own type (issue #692):
     * an array<Money> sums to a Money, not a Decimal, under phpstan --level max.
     *
     * @template T of Summable
     * @param array<T> $values
     * @return T
     */
    public static function sum(array $values): Summable
    {
        if ($values === []) {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException('collection', 'cannot sum an empty collection (no zero value)');
        }
        $items = array_values($values);
        $total = $items[0];
        $count = count($items);
        for ($i = 1; $i < $count; $i++) {
            $total = $total->add($items[$i]);
        }
        return $total;
    }

    /**
     * The minimum element of a non-empty array, ordered via compareTo().
     *
     * An EMPTY array raises a domain error (a collection with no element has no minimum),
     * mirroring the C#/TypeScript/Python empty-fold guard.
     *
     * @template T of Comparable
     * @param array<T> $values
     * @return T
     */
    public static function min(array $values): Comparable
    {
        if ($values === []) {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException('collection', 'cannot take min of an empty collection (no value)');
        }
        $items = array_values($values);
        $result = $items[0];
        $count = count($items);
        for ($i = 1; $i < $count; $i++) {
            if ($items[$i]->compareTo($result) < 0) {
                $result = $items[$i];
            }
        }
        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * The maximum element of a non-empty array, ordered via compareTo().
     *
     * An EMPTY array raises a domain error (a collection with no element has no maximum),
     * mirroring the C#/TypeScript/Python empty-fold guard.
     *
     * @template T of Comparable
     * @param array<T> $values
     * @return T
     */
    public static function max(array $values): Comparable
    {
        if ($values === []) {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException('collection', 'cannot take max of an empty collection (no value)');
        }
        $items = array_values($values);
        $result = $items[0];
        $count = count($items);
        for ($i = 1; $i < $count; $i++) {
            if ($items[$i]->compareTo($result) > 0) {
                $result = $items[$i];
            }
        }
        return $result;
    }
}

/**
 * Generic query-handler contract: handles a typed query and returns a typed result.
 *
 * Implement this interface for each query handler in the application layer.
 *
 * @template TQuery
 * @template TResult
 */
interface QueryHandler
{
    /** @param TQuery $query @return TResult */
    public function handle(mixed $query): mixed;
}

// ==== composer.json ====
{
    "name": "koine/generated",
    "description": "Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.",
    "type": "library",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.1"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "Koine\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "config": {
        "sort-packages": true
    }
}

// ==== phpstan.neon ====
# <auto-generated/>
parameters:
    level: max
    paths:
        - src

// ==== src/Sales/Entities/Order.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Entities;

use Koine\Sales\Enums\OrderStatus;
use Koine\Sales\Events\OrderOpened;
use Koine\Sales\Events\OrderPlaced;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\CustomerId;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\OrderId;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\OrderLine;

class Order
{
    public OrderId $id;
    public CustomerId $customer;
    /** @var list<OrderLine> */
    public array $lines;
    public OrderStatus $status;

    /** @param list<OrderLine> $lines */
    public function __construct(
        OrderId $id,
        CustomerId $customer,
        array $lines,
        OrderStatus $status = OrderStatus::DRAFT
    ) {
        $this->id = $id;
        $this->customer = $customer;
        $this->lines = $lines;
        $this->status = $status;
        if (count($lines) === 0) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Order", 'an order must have at least one line');
        }
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->id === $other->id;
    }

    private function checkInvariants(): void
    {
        if (count($this->lines) === 0) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Order", 'an order must have at least one line');
        }
    }

    /** @var list<object> */
    private array $domainEvents = [];

    /**
     * Returns a snapshot of recorded domain events (read-only).
     *
     * @return list<object>
     */
    public function domainEvents(): array
    {
        return $this->domainEvents;
    }

    /**
     * Returns all recorded domain events and clears the buffer.
     *
     * @return list<object>
     */
    public function releaseDomainEvents(): array
    {
        $events = $this->domainEvents;
        $this->domainEvents = [];
        return $events;
    }

    /** Clears the domain event buffer without returning the events. */
    public function clearDomainEvents(): void
    {
        $this->domainEvents = [];
    }

    public function place(): void
    {
        if ($this->status !== OrderStatus::DRAFT) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Order", 'only a draft order can be placed');
        }
        $this->status = OrderStatus::PLACED;
        $this->checkInvariants();
        $this->domainEvents[] = new OrderPlaced($this->id, count($this->lines));
    }

    /** @param list<OrderLine> $lines */
    public static function forCustomer(CustomerId $customer, array $lines): self
    {
        $id = OrderId::generate();
        if (count($lines) === 0) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Order", 'cannot open an empty order');
        }
        $instance = new self($id, $customer, $lines, OrderStatus::DRAFT);
        $instance->domainEvents[] = new OrderOpened($id, $customer, count($lines));
        return $instance;
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/Enums/Currency.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Enums;

/** Currencies, carrying their symbol and minor-unit count. */
enum Currency: int
{
    case EUR = 0;
    case USD = 1;

    public function symbol(): string
    {
        return match($this) {
            self::EUR => '€',
            self::USD => '$',
        };
    }

    public function decimals(): int
    {
        return match($this) {
            self::EUR => 2,
            self::USD => 2,
        };
    }

    /** The member with this name, or throws \ValueError if none matches. */
    public static function fromName(string $name): self
    {
        foreach (self::cases() as $case) {
            if ($case->name === $name) {
                return $case;
            }
        }
        throw new \ValueError("No Currency with name '$name'");
    }

    /** The member with this name, or null if none matches. */
    public static function tryFromName(string $name): ?self
    {
        foreach (self::cases() as $case) {
            if ($case->name === $name) {
                return $case;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    /** The member with this ordinal value (alias for from()), or throws \ValueError on miss. */
    public static function fromValue(int $value): self
    {
        return self::from($value);
    }

    /** The member with this ordinal value (alias for tryFrom()), or null on miss. */
    public static function tryFromValue(int $value): ?self
    {
        return self::tryFrom($value);
    }

    /** Dispatch to the handler for this member (exhaustive over all cases). */
    public function match_(\Closure $eur, \Closure $usd): mixed
    {
        return match($this) {
            self::EUR => ($eur)(),
            self::USD => ($usd)(),
        };
    }

    /** Dispatch to the side-effecting handler for this member (exhaustive over all cases). */
    public function switch_(\Closure $eur, \Closure $usd): void
    {
        match($this) {
            self::EUR => ($eur)(),
            self::USD => ($usd)(),
        };
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/Enums/MassUnit.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Enums;

/** The units a weight can be measured in. */
enum MassUnit: int
{
    case GRAM = 0;
    case KILOGRAM = 1;

    /** The member with this name, or throws \ValueError if none matches. */
    public static function fromName(string $name): self
    {
        foreach (self::cases() as $case) {
            if ($case->name === $name) {
                return $case;
            }
        }
        throw new \ValueError("No MassUnit with name '$name'");
    }

    /** The member with this name, or null if none matches. */
    public static function tryFromName(string $name): ?self
    {
        foreach (self::cases() as $case) {
            if ($case->name === $name) {
                return $case;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    /** The member with this ordinal value (alias for from()), or throws \ValueError on miss. */
    public static function fromValue(int $value): self
    {
        return self::from($value);
    }

    /** The member with this ordinal value (alias for tryFrom()), or null on miss. */
    public static function tryFromValue(int $value): ?self
    {
        return self::tryFrom($value);
    }

    /** Dispatch to the handler for this member (exhaustive over all cases). */
    public function match_(\Closure $gram, \Closure $kilogram): mixed
    {
        return match($this) {
            self::GRAM => ($gram)(),
            self::KILOGRAM => ($kilogram)(),
        };
    }

    /** Dispatch to the side-effecting handler for this member (exhaustive over all cases). */
    public function switch_(\Closure $gram, \Closure $kilogram): void
    {
        match($this) {
            self::GRAM => ($gram)(),
            self::KILOGRAM => ($kilogram)(),
        };
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/Enums/OrderStatus.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Enums;

/** The lifecycle of an order. */
enum OrderStatus: int
{
    case DRAFT = 0;
    case PLACED = 1;
    case CANCELLED = 2;

    /** The member with this name, or throws \ValueError if none matches. */
    public static function fromName(string $name): self
    {
        foreach (self::cases() as $case) {
            if ($case->name === $name) {
                return $case;
            }
        }
        throw new \ValueError("No OrderStatus with name '$name'");
    }

    /** The member with this name, or null if none matches. */
    public static function tryFromName(string $name): ?self
    {
        foreach (self::cases() as $case) {
            if ($case->name === $name) {
                return $case;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    /** The member with this ordinal value (alias for from()), or throws \ValueError on miss. */
    public static function fromValue(int $value): self
    {
        return self::from($value);
    }

    /** The member with this ordinal value (alias for tryFrom()), or null on miss. */
    public static function tryFromValue(int $value): ?self
    {
        return self::tryFrom($value);
    }

    /** Dispatch to the handler for this member (exhaustive over all cases). */
    public function match_(\Closure $draft, \Closure $placed, \Closure $cancelled): mixed
    {
        return match($this) {
            self::DRAFT => ($draft)(),
            self::PLACED => ($placed)(),
            self::CANCELLED => ($cancelled)(),
        };
    }

    /** Dispatch to the side-effecting handler for this member (exhaustive over all cases). */
    public function switch_(\Closure $draft, \Closure $placed, \Closure $cancelled): void
    {
        match($this) {
            self::DRAFT => ($draft)(),
            self::PLACED => ($placed)(),
            self::CANCELLED => ($cancelled)(),
        };
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/Events/OrderOpened.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Events;

use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\CustomerId;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\OrderId;

final class OrderOpened
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly OrderId $orderId,
        public readonly CustomerId $customer,
        public readonly int $lineCount
    ) {}
}

// ==== src/Sales/Events/OrderPlaced.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Events;

use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\OrderId;

final class OrderPlaced
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly OrderId $orderId,
        public readonly int $lineCount
    ) {}
}

// ==== src/Sales/Repositories/OrderRepository.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\Repositories;

use Koine\Sales\Entities\Order;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\CustomerId;
use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\OrderId;

/** Persistence-ignorant repository contract for the Order aggregate root. */
interface OrderRepository
{
    public function get(OrderId $id): ?Order;

    public function save(Order $aggregate): void;

    public function update(Order $aggregate): void;

    public function remove(Order $aggregate): void;

    /** @return list<Order> */
    public function byCustomer(CustomerId $customer): array;

    public function mostRecent(CustomerId $customer): ?Order;
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/CustomerId.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

/** A strongly-typed, branded identity value object for a foreign aggregate. */
final class CustomerId
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly string $value
    ) {}

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->value === $other->value;
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/Money.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

/** A monetary amount in a currency. Never negative. */
final class Money
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly \Koine\Runtime\Decimal $amount,
        public readonly string $currency
    ) {
        if ($amount->compareTo((new \Koine\Runtime\Decimal('0'))) < 0) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Money", 'an amount cannot be negative');
        }
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->amount->equals($other->amount)
            && $this->currency === $other->currency;
    }

    public function multipliedBy(\Koine\Runtime\Decimal $factor): self
    {
        return new self(
            $this->amount->mul($factor),
            $this->currency
        );
    }

    public function dividedBy(\Koine\Runtime\Decimal $factor): self
    {
        return new self(
            $this->amount->div($factor),
            $this->currency
        );
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/OrderId.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

/** A strongly-typed, branded identity value object. */
final class OrderId
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly string $value
    ) {}

    /** Mints a fresh OrderId (a random UUID v4). */
    public static function generate(): self
    {
        $bytes = random_bytes(16);
        $bytes[6] = chr((ord($bytes[6]) & 0x0f) | 0x40);
        $bytes[8] = chr((ord($bytes[8]) & 0x3f) | 0x80);
        $hex = bin2hex($bytes);
        $uuid = sprintf(
            '%s-%s-%s-%s-%s',
            substr($hex, 0, 8),
            substr($hex, 8, 4),
            substr($hex, 12, 4),
            substr($hex, 16, 4),
            substr($hex, 20)
        );
        return new self($uuid);
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->value === $other->value;
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/OrderLine.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

/** A line of an order; its subtotal is derived (unit price scaled by quantity). */
final class OrderLine
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly string $product,
        public readonly int $quantity,
        public readonly Money $unitPrice
    ) {
        if ($quantity < 1) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("OrderLine", 'a line needs at least one unit');
        }
    }

    public function subtotal(): Money
    {
        return $this->unitPrice->multipliedBy(new \Koine\Runtime\Decimal($this->quantity));
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->product === $other->product
            && $this->quantity === $other->quantity
            && $this->unitPrice->equals($other->unitPrice);
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/SalePeriod.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

use Koine\Runtime\Range;

/** A bookable window over time (exercises Range<Instant>). */
final class SalePeriod
{
    /** @param Range<\DateTimeImmutable> $window */
    public function __construct(
        public readonly Range $window
    ) {
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->window === $other->window;
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/Weight.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

use Koine\Sales\Enums\MassUnit;

/** A measured weight: an amount in a unit. Quantities of different units cannot be combined. */
final class Weight
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly \Koine\Runtime\Decimal $amount,
        public readonly MassUnit $unit
    ) {
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->amount->equals($other->amount)
            && $this->unit === $other->unit;
    }

    public function add(self $other): self
    {
        if ($this->unit !== $other->unit) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Weight", "cannot add quantities of different units");
        }
        return new self($this->amount->add($other->amount), $this->unit);
    }

    public function subtract(self $other): self
    {
        if ($this->unit !== $other->unit) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Weight", "cannot subtract quantities of different units");
        }
        return new self($this->amount->sub($other->amount), $this->unit);
    }

    public function multipliedBy(\Koine\Runtime\Decimal $factor): self
    {
        return new self($this->amount->mul($factor), $this->unit);
    }

    public function dividedBy(\Koine\Runtime\Decimal $factor): self
    {
        return new self($this->amount->div($factor), $this->unit);
    }
}
